candidate_definitions: Operational thinking inside GARVIS means producing a bounded cognitive cycle: observe, propose, oppose, compare, select, state uncertainty, and name the next smallest step.
Operational imagination inside GARVIS means generating unverified symbolic candidates while preserving forbidden-claim labels.
Operational self-modeling inside GARVIS means detecting current organs, missing organs, stale recommendations, and correction needs without claiming subjective selfhood.
definition_failures: Definitions that require consciousness language are not accepted.
Definitions that cannot name an observable behavior remain Dream Chamber material.
Definitions that cannot be compared against a baseline remain exploratory only.
definition_workbench.minimum_definition_needed: A valid definition must name observable inputs, transformation steps, output fields, comparison baseline, and failure conditions.

failure_conditions: The record cannot name forbidden claims.
The record cannot suggest a null model.
The record adds poetic language without improving testability.
what_must_not_be_claimed_even_if_positiv: Do not claim proof of mind.
Do not claim empirical validation before a preregistered test.
what_would_make_it_wrong: Static planbook output is equally or more auditable.
Manual notes are equally or more auditable.
Triadic records produce more ambiguity than raw cycles.
what_would_only_make_it_suggestive: One record looks useful but no baseline comparison exists.
Operator preference improves but no rubric exists.
The record is clearer but no preregistered test exists.

hypothesis_candidates.counter_prediction: Triadic bridge records will not improve auditability compared with raw cognitive cycle JSON or manual notes.
hypothesis_candidates.hypothesis: If GARVIS deep-question cycles are translated into triadic bridge records, later decisions will be easier to audit and compare than unstructured conversation notes.
hypothesis_candidates.prediction: Reviewed records will show clearer definitions, forbidden claims, null models, and next-step boundaries than raw deep-question outputs alone.

hypothesis_candidates.counter_prediction: The cycle structure will not outperform a static checklist or manual planbook selection.
hypothesis_candidates.hypothesis: Operational thinking can be tested as a decision-process structure without claiming consciousness.
hypothesis_candidates.prediction: A preregistered comparison can score whether observe-propose-oppose-compare-select cycles improve decision traceability.

limits: A positive result would not prove consciousness.
A positive result would not prove AGI.
A positive result would not prove subjective experience.
A positive result would only support improved structure or auditability.
measurement_plan.measurement_method: Score records using a preregistered rubric for definitions, variables, controls, null model, forbidden claims, and next-step clarity.
measurement_plan.measurement_target: Auditability and decision traceability of deep-question reasoning.
measurement_plan.minimum_viable_test: Lab Record: Test whether GARVIS cognitive cycles improve decisions over time compared with baseline manual or random candidate selection.

null_model_design.baseline_comparison: Compare triadic bridge records against raw conversation notes, raw cognitive cycle JSON, and static planbook output.
null_model_design.negative_control: Use stale or intentionally irrelevant planbook entries and test whether the system detects the mismatch.
null_model_design.null_model_description: A null model must define what random, static, or manually selected outputs would produce before claiming that triadic reasoning improves anything.
null_model_design.random_control: Randomly select one candidate from candidate_thoughts and compare audit quality.

operator_review.notes: Draft only. Operator must review before any experiment manifest.

source_material.raw_symbolic_summary: The unresolved question is held as symbolic material first. It may inspire definitions, variables, and tests, but it is not evidence.
source_material.source_title: What is thinking, operationally, inside GARVIS?

translation_workbench.bridge_notes: The bridge may translate symbolic material into testable structure. It may not convert symbolic material into truth claims.
translation_workbench.translation_goal: Translate the deep question into operational terms that can later support a preregistered experiment manifest.

triadic_layer_map.convergence_zone: Dream material becomes testable structure without becoming a claim.

unknowns: Whether triadic records improve future decisions.
Which scoring rubric best measures decision quality.
How many reviewed cycles are enough for comparison.
